reason: Feature spans Panel DB/API, control protocol, node persistence/runtime, S3 routing, and Vue UI; map and preserve every boundary contract.
Reuse existing standalone validation, quota formatting, cache invalidation, and API/UI patterns without duplicating divergent contracts.
Backend guideline index for selecting the database, storage, auth/quota, hooks, and webadmin contracts touched by this task.
Panel and node schema changes must stay additive, GORM-portable across SQLite/MySQL/Postgres, and migration-validated.
Managed bucket visibility and deletion must preserve native object bytes, paths, listing semantics, and sanitized storage errors.
Credential status/quota cache behavior and bucket ACL/existence checks must remain immediately correct for signed and anonymous S3 requests.
Webhook CRUD and desired-state apply must preserve non-blocking delivery, supported event taxonomy, retries, and runtime reload semantics.
Panel admin APIs reuse authenticated JSON, credential secret-once, bucket validation, error, and audit-adjacent webadmin conventions.
Frontend guideline index for the shared Vue admin bundle and runtime-selected Panel mode.
Panel node detail components must preserve typed apiFetch behavior, one-time secrets, restrained UI, error states, responsive layout, and browser validation.
